posts.author: KatBony (Katherine (Kat) Bony)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Filter option to filter to number of days, weeks or months (not just current, next or past)
Filter option by connect field (mirror column)

What are you trying to achieve

We use this as a scheduling tool and need to be able to look out a rolling number of weeks for scheduling without having to look at the entire schedule or update the date every day/week.

posts.author: YOGESHP (Yogesh Pokale)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @KatBony,

This would be a really valuable feature — especially for teams using monday.com as a scheduling tool. A rolling date filter (like “next 2 weeks”) and stronger mirror-column filtering would make planning much easier.

Based on what you’re trying to achieve a rolling view of upcoming work without weekly maintenance, here are a few workarounds you can use:

  • Create a Formula column that checks whether a date falls within the next X weeks, then filter by that result (e.g., “In Range”) to create a self-updating view.

  • Use a helper Status column with automation (e.g., if Date is within the next 4 weeks → set Status to “Upcoming”) and filter by that status.

  • For Connect/Mirror filtering, sync the mirrored value into a regular column via automation so you can filter directly on a standard column.
